---
title: "NSF Proposal Checklist"
subtitle: "Auto-generated status report"
date: today
format:
  nsf-proposal-typst:
    fontsize: 10pt
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(knitr)

# ── Helper functions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

# Read a file safely; return "" if it doesn't exist
read_safe <- function(path) {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    paste(readLines(path, warn = FALSE), collapse = "\n")
  } else {
    ""
  }
}

# Count non-empty lines as a rough proxy for content length
line_count <- function(text) {
  lines <- str_split(text, "\n")[[1]]
  sum(str_length(str_trim(lines)) > 0)
}

# Check whether any of a vector of patterns appears in text
any_match <- function(text, patterns) {
  any(map_lgl(patterns, ~ str_detect(text, fixed(.x, ignore_case = TRUE))))
}

# Check whether ALL patterns appear in text
all_match <- function(text, patterns) {
  all(map_lgl(patterns, ~ str_detect(text, fixed(.x, ignore_case = TRUE))))
}

# ── Document registry ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
# Update this table to match your proposal's documents.
docs <- tribble(
  ~key,                ~label,                                 ~file,                       ~page_limit, ~required,
  "summary",           "Project Summary",                      "01-project-summary.qmd",        1,           TRUE,
  "description",       "Project Description",                  "02-project-description.qmd",    15,          TRUE,
  "references",        "References Cited",                     "03-references.qmd",             NA,          TRUE,
  "budget",            "Budget Justification",                 "04-budget-justification.qmd",   5,           TRUE,
  "facilities",        "Facilities, Equipment & Resources",    "05-facilities.qmd",             NA,          TRUE,
  "data_mgmt",         "Data Management and Sharing Plan",     "06-data-management.qmd",        2,           TRUE,
  "synergistic",       "Synergistic Activities (1 pg/person)",  "07-synergistic-activities.qmd", 1,          TRUE,
  "mentoring",         "Mentoring Plan (1 page max)",          "08-mentoring-plan.qmd",         1,           FALSE,
  "current_pending",   "Current and Pending (SciENcv)",         "09-current-pending.qmd",       NA,          TRUE,
  "pi_summary",        "PI Summary",                           "10-pi-summary.qmd",             NA,          FALSE,
  "letters",           "Supplementary Letters",                 NA,                              NA,          TRUE
)

# ── Placeholder patterns to flag ──────────────────────────────────────────────
# These indicate content the PI still needs to fill in.
# Add your own patterns as needed.
placeholder_patterns <- c(
  "TODO",
  "<!-- SOURCE -->",
  "<!-- TITLE -->",
  "<!-- AMOUNT -->",
  "<!-- START",
  "<!-- X -->",
  "XX,XXX",
  "Start–End",
  "X months",
  "[citations needed]",
  "placeholder",
  "Your Proposal Title Here",
  "Your Name",
  "Your Institution",
  "Your Title",
  "0000-0000-0000-0000"
)

# ── Required section patterns per document ────────────────────────────────────
# Customize these to match your solicitation's requirements.
required_sections <- list(
  summary = c(
    "Intellectual Merit",
    "Broader Impacts"
  ),
  description = c(
    "Intellectual Merit",
    "Broader Impacts",
    "Results from Prior NSF Support",
    "Research Plan"
  ),
  references = c(
    "#refs"
  ),
  budget = c(
    "Senior Personnel",
    "Travel",
    "Indirect Costs"
  ),
  data_mgmt = c(
    "Types of Data",
    "Access and Sharing",
    "Preservation"
  )
)

# ── Compute status for each document ──────────────────────────────────────────
doc_status <- docs |>
  mutate(
    exists        = map_lgl(file, ~ !is.na(.x) && file.exists(.x)),
    content       = map_chr(file, ~ if (!is.na(.x)) read_safe(.x) else ""),
    n_lines       = map_int(content, line_count),
    has_todo      = map_lgl(content, ~ any_match(.x, placeholder_patterns)),
    n_placeholders = map_int(content, function(txt) {
      sum(map_int(placeholder_patterns, ~ str_count(txt, fixed(.x, ignore_case = TRUE))))
    }),
    sections_ok   = map2_lgl(key, content, function(k, txt) {
      if (k %in% names(required_sections)) {
        all_match(txt, required_sections[[k]])
      } else {
        NA
      }
    }),
    missing_sections = map2_chr(key, content, function(k, txt) {
      if (k %in% names(required_sections)) {
        missing <- keep(required_sections[[k]], ~ !str_detect(txt, fixed(.x, ignore_case = TRUE)))
        if (length(missing) == 0) "—" else paste(missing, collapse = "; ")
      } else {
        "—"
      }
    })
  )
```

## Document Status

*Rendered automatically from source files on `r format(Sys.Date(), "%B %d, %Y")`.*

```{r doc-table}
doc_status |>
  transmute(
    Document       = label,
    `Page Limit`   = if_else(is.na(page_limit), "none", as.character(page_limit)),
    Required       = if_else(required, "yes", "no"),
    `File Exists`  = case_when(
      is.na(file)  ~ "n/a",
      exists       ~ "yes",
      TRUE         ~ "NO"
    ),
    Placeholders   = if_else(
      is.na(file), "—",
      if_else(has_todo, paste0("YES (", n_placeholders, ")"), "clear")
    ),
    `Req. Sections` = if_else(
      is.na(sections_ok), "—",
      if_else(sections_ok, "yes", "see below")
    )
  ) |>
  kable(align = c("l", "c", "c", "c", "c", "c"))
```

## Placeholder Details

*Documents with unfilled placeholder text:*

```{r placeholders-detail}
flagged <- doc_status |>
  filter(!is.na(file), has_todo) |>
  select(label, content) |>
  mutate(
    instances = map2(label, content, function(lbl, txt) {
      lines <- str_split(txt, "\n")[[1]]
      tibble(
        Document = lbl,
        Line     = seq_along(lines),
        Text     = lines
      ) |>
        filter(map_lgl(Text, ~ any_match(.x, placeholder_patterns))) |>
        mutate(Text = str_trunc(str_trim(Text), 80))
    })
  ) |>
  pull(instances) |>
  bind_rows()

if (nrow(flagged) == 0) {
  cat("No placeholders detected. All documents appear complete.\n")
} else {
  flagged |>
    kable(align = c("l", "r", "l"))
}
```

## Missing Required Sections

```{r missing-sections}
missing_tbl <- doc_status |>
  filter(!is.na(file), !is.na(sections_ok), !sections_ok) |>
  select(Document = label, `Missing Sections` = missing_sections)

if (nrow(missing_tbl) == 0) {
  cat("All required sections detected in all documents.\n")
} else {
  missing_tbl |> kable(align = c("l", "l"))
}
```

## NSF Upload Checklist

*Use this checklist when submitting in Research.gov.*

```{r upload-checklist}
upload_items <- tribble(
  ~Step, ~Action, ~File,
  "1",  "Upload Project Summary (1 page max)",                  "01-project-summary.pdf",
  "2",  "Upload Project Description (15 pages max)",           "02-project-description.pdf",
  "3",  "Upload References Cited",                             "03-references.pdf",
  "4",  "Enter budget in Research.gov budget tool",             "(online — no upload)",
  "5",  "Upload Budget Justification (5 pages max)",           "04-budget-justification.pdf",
  "6",  "Upload Facilities, Equipment & Other Resources",      "05-facilities.pdf",
  "7",  "Upload Data Management and Sharing Plan (2 pg max)",  "06-data-management.pdf",
  "8",  "Upload Synergistic Activities (1 pg/person)",         "07-synergistic-activities.pdf",
  "9",  "Upload Mentoring Plan (1 page max, if applicable)",   "08-mentoring-plan.pdf",
  "10", "Submit Biographical Sketches via SciENcv",            "(SciENcv — no page limit)",
  "11", "Submit Current and Pending via SciENcv",              "(SciENcv)",
  "12", "Submit Collaborators & Other Affiliations",           "(NSF Excel template)",
  "13", "Upload supplementary letters of collaboration",       "(separate PDFs)",
  "14", "Verify cover sheet fields",                           "(Research.gov)",
  "15", "Submit by 5 p.m. submitting org's local time",        "Check your solicitation"
)

upload_items |>
  kable(align = c("c", "l", "l"))
```

---

*This checklist is generated automatically by `checklist.qmd`. Re-render after editing any proposal document to get an updated status report. Run `make checklist` or `quarto render checklist.qmd`.*
